arts.ttl: Gilardino: “Let’s forget last year, I expect a Genoa-like performance”
arts.sum: Genoa manager Alberto Gilardino addressed the media in a pre-match conference ahead of his team’s upcoming fixture against Roma. The coach touched on various topics, including player fitness, team mentality, and the challenges of facing a strong opponent. Gilardino began by expressing satisfaction with his players’ international performances: “I’m happy that they played, some more than others. I’m pleased that Genoa players had the opportunity to confirm their places in their respective national teams. It’s a fact. The work of these years has enhanced the characteristics of individuals. arts.ttl: De Rossi: “I don’t think the decision to exclude Zalewski from the squad is final”
arts.sum: Roma prepare to face Genoa on Sunday and head coach Daniele De Rossi addressed various topics in his pre-match press conference. Speaking about the situation involving Nicola Zalewski, De Rossi said: “I don’t think the decision to exclude Zalewski from the squad is final. It’s related to his contract situation, which is expiring. The club made this choice and informed me a few days ago. Everything is tied to his contract, and nothing in football is definitive. If they reach an agreement for renewal, I believe he will be brought back. But I don’t know what to say because it’s The post De Rossi: “I don’t think the decision to exclude Zalewski from the squad is final” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Genoa v Roma: Match Preview
arts.sum: Roma will travel to Stadio Luigi Ferraris on Sunday looking to secure their first win of the Serie A season against Genoa. The capital club has struggled out of the gates, collecting just two points from their opening three matches. Meanwhile, Genoa sit two points ahead of Roma in the early table despite losing their most recent outing. Daniele De Rossi’s Roma side have yet to find their attacking rhythm, scoring just once in three games despite bringing in high-profile additions like Artem Dovbyk. arts.ttl: Zalewski’s Roma future in doubt after rejecting contract and transfer
arts.sum: Nicola Zalewski’s time at AS Roma appears to be coming to an end after the Polish winger rejected both a contract renewal offer and a transfer to Galatasaray. The 21-year-old is now training separately from the first team squad as the club looks to resolve his future. La Gazzetta dello Sport report how Roma had offered Zalewski a substantial pay increase on his current €350,000 per year salary in an attempt to extend his contract beyond 2025.
